message:
🐛 Fix 24 skeleton missions and update Knative K8s version (#1466)

- Rewrote 24 install missions that had zero code blocks (empty skeletons)
  with real, actionable installation instructions from official docs
- CLI tools (9): container2wasm, copa, kitops, stacker, notation, carvel,
  wasmedge, monocle, sermant — now show proper local install steps
- K8s services (11): bank-vaults, containerssh, kuberhealthy, logging-operator,
  kagent, wasmcloud, openyurt, kmesh, kubefleet, interlink, tremor — now show
  real Helm/kubectl install steps
- Special cases (4): hyperlight (Rust crate), inclavare-containers (SGX runtime),
  kairos (immutable OS), opengemini (time series DB) — proper install methods
- Fixed Knative Serving min K8s version: >=1.28 → >=1.33 (per maintainer feedback)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
